title: Commit/Rollback Support on DB2
text: Commit/Rollback Support on DB2 Both the commit and rollback instructions are supported by the DB2 connector. However, you should never use them in an SQL string with the sql instruction. Two-Phase Commit Not supported. Related Links Transaction Control A transaction is a complete, logical unit of work. It usually involves adding, deleting or updating one or more logically related records in one or more databases. With Uniface, you can explicitly define a transaction with the commit ProcScript instruction. If an error occurs, a transaction can be rolled back with the rollback ProcScript instruction. commit Commit a transaction to a DBMS or path. rollback Undo the transaction (if supported by DBMS). sql Pass a DML statement to the specified DBMS path.
